languages.text: "Мой ответ — "нет", наследни{mf|к|ца}, и на то есть две причины. Первая: вы сопротивляетесь разумной критике, из чего следует, что никто, кроме меня, не указывал вам на слабости. Вторая: этот флагман принадлежит династии фон Валанциус, равно как и я принадлежу к ней. И в его пределах я вправе делать все, что сочту нужным".
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Себериан
Опционально: насмешливый поклон/реверанс/другая подходящая анимация, если честь

traits.locale_text: "Мой ответ — "нет", наследни{mf|к|ца}, и на то есть две причины. Первая: к старшим надлежит обращаться на "вы", согласно правилам приличия. Вторая: этот флагман принадлежит династии фон Валанциус, равно как и я принадлежу к ней. И в его пределах я вправе делать все, что сочту нужным".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."
languages.original_text: "Мой ответ — "нет", наследни{mf|к|ца}, и на то есть две причины. Первая: вы сопротивляетесь разумной критике, из чего следует, что никто, кроме меня, не указывал вам на слабости. Вторая: этот флагман принадлежит династии фон Валанциус, равно как и я принадлежу к ней. И в его пределах я вправе делать все, что сочту нужным".

traits.locale_text: "My answer is no, heir, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, and I belong to it as well. Within its limits, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

languages.text: «Mi respuesta es no, y existen dos razones para mi negativa. En primer lugar, se muestra {mf|reacio|reacia} a aceptar críticas por razonables que sean, lo cual me sugiere que he sido el único en señalar sus flaquezas. En segundo lugar, esta nave insignia pertenece a la dinastía de los Von Valancius, al igual que yo. Y dentro de sus confines, tengo el legítimo derecho a actuar como considere oportuno».
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

traits.locale_text: «Mi respuesta es no, y existen dos razones para mi negativa. En primer lugar, se muestra {mf|reacio|reacia} a aceptar críticas por razonables que sean, lo cual me sugiere que he sido el único en señalar sus flaquezas. En segundo lugar, esta nave insignia pertenece a la dinastía de los Von Valancius, al igual que yo. Y dentro de sus confines, tengo el legítimo derecho a actuar como considere oportuno».

languages.text: “我拒绝，原因有二。其一，你拒绝接受合理的批评，这意味着除了我，从来没有人指出过你的不足之处。其二，这艘旗舰属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝，而我也是王朝的一部分。因此，在这艘船上，我有权按自己的意志行事。”
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

traits.locale_text: “我拒绝，原因有二。其一，你拒绝接受合理的批评，这意味着除了我，从来没有人指出过你的不足之处。其二，这艘旗舰属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝，而我也是王朝的一部分。因此，在这艘船上，我有权按自己的意志行事。”

languages.text: « Ma réponse est non, et ce, pour deux raisons. Premièrement, vous êtes {mf|sourd|sourde} à la critique constructive, preuve que personne avant moi ne vous a jamais mis le nez dans vos propres faiblesses. Deuxièmement, ce vaisseau amiral appartient à la dynastie von Valancius, et moi aussi. Autrement dit, dans son enceinte, je suis libre de mes faits et gestes. »
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

traits.locale_text: « Ma réponse est non, et ce, pour deux raisons. Premièrement, vous êtes {mf|sourd|sourde} à la critique constructive, preuve que personne avant moi ne vous a jamais mis le nez dans vos propres faiblesses. Deuxièmement, ce vaisseau amiral appartient à la dynastie von Valancius, et moi aussi. Autrement dit, dans son enceinte, je suis libre de mes faits et gestes. »

languages.text: "Cevabım hayır, bunun da iki nedeni var. Birincisi: Mantıklı eleştirilere direniyorsun, buradan anlaşılan o ki benden başka kimse sana zayıflıklarını göstermemiş. İkincisi: Bu sancak gemisi, benim gibi von Valancius hanedanlığına ait. Sınırları dâhilinde uygun gördüğüm her şeyi yapmaya hakkım var."
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

traits.locale_text: "Cevabım hayır, bunun da iki nedeni var. Birincisi: Mantıklı eleştirilere direniyorsun, buradan anlaşılan o ki benden başka kimse sana zayıflıklarını göstermemiş. İkincisi: Bu sancak gemisi, benim gibi von Valancius hanedanlığına ait. Sınırları dâhilinde uygun gördüğüm her şeyi yapmaya hakkım var."

languages.text: 「私の答えはノーです。その理由は二つあります。まず、あなたは正当な批判に抵抗します。つまり、あなたに弱点を見せたのは私だけです。そして、この旗艦は、私と同じようにフォン・ヴァランキウス家のものです。この旗艦の中では、私は自分の思うように行動する権利があります。」
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."

traits.locale_text: 「私の答えはノーです。その理由は二つあります。まず、あなたは正当な批判に抵抗します。つまり、あなたに弱点を見せたのは私だけです。そして、この旗艦は、私と同じようにフォン・ヴァランキウス家のものです。この旗艦の中では、私は自分の思うように行動する権利があります。」

languages.text: "Meine Antwort ist nein, und zwar aus zwei Gründen. Erstens: Ihr verweigert Euch berechtigter Kritik. Es ist also davon auszugehen, dass Euch noch nie jemand Eure Schwächen aufgezeigt hat. Zweitens: Dieses Flaggschiff gehört genau wie ich der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Innerhalb seiner Grenzen kann ich daher tun, was ich für richtig halte."
languages.original_text: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."
